About SBI Flexicap Fund
SBI Flexicap Fund is an equity fund. This fund was started on 1 January, 2013. The fund is managed by Anup Upadhyay. The fund could potentially beat inflation in the long-run.
Key Parameters
SBI Flexicap Fund has ₹22387 Cr worth of assets under management (AUM) as on Jun 2026 and is more than category average.
The fund has an expense ratio 0.8.
SBI Flexicap Fund has given a CAGR return of 14.79% since inception. Over the last 1, 3 and 5 years the fund has given a CAGR return of 1.51%, 10.44% and 10.54% respective
